products.name: 10 AI Automations Saving 5 Hrs/Week
products.description: A starter pack for operators who want real automation, not theory. Includes: a 5-page PDF of 10 proven time-sinks and how to automate each, plus 1 importable n8n workflow (lead-capture → auto-follow-up). Delivered to inbox.
bullets: One workflow you can run today

products.name: AI Automation Starter Kit
products.tagline: 7 n8n workflows that run your busywork.
products.description: Seven production-ready n8n workflows covering lead capture, follow-up sequencing, invoice generation, support triage, weekly reporting, content repurposing, and competitive scraping. Comes with a 20-minute Loom, JSON import files, and a setup checklist.
bullets: Works with free n8n self-host or n8n Cloud

products.name: Business Ops Prompt Vault
products.description: A Notion database of 80 prompts used inside real companies — sales discovery, ops SOPs, content repurposing, HR interviewing, finance summaries. Each prompt ships with an example output, a tuning guide, and the model it's optimized for.
bullets: Notion DB with filters and tags

products.name: Chatbot-in-a-Box
products.tagline: Deploy a RAG chatbot in one hour.
products.description: Everything to ship a production chatbot on Telegram, WhatsApp, or your site. Includes: n8n orchestration workflow, vector DB schema (Supabase pgvector), knowledge-base ingestor, conversation logger, and a 60-minute video build-along.

products.name: Freelancer Ops Stack
products.description: A complete operating system for freelancers and solo consultants — CRM, proposal generator, invoicing, client portal, and the n8n automations that tie them together. Built from systems used by $10k/mo operators.

products.name: Automation Audit + Done-For-You Build
products.tagline: 60-min diagnostic. One custom workflow. Delivered in 7 days.
products.description: Book a diagnostic call, we map your 3 biggest time-sinks, then we build one custom n8n workflow end-to-end within 7 days. Includes 30 days of post-launch support. Limited to 4 projects per month.

products.name: AI Automation Transformation
products.tagline: Rewire your business. 5 workflows. 90 days of support.
products.description: The full transformation engagement: a deep audit, 5 custom n8n workflows built across sales, ops, delivery, support, and reporting, team training, and 90 days of hands-on support. For operators serious about scaling.
